LAW AND MOTION 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. PETITIONER MCGRATH ELECTRIC, INC.'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-02-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF HEARIONG ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MCGRATH ELECTRIC, INC. HEARING SET FOR MAY-02-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MCGRATH ELECTRIC, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT JDS BUILDERS GROUP, INC. $209,736.24 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $209,736.24, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER
